description_long: This is a vintage metal lantern with a cylindrical glass enclosure, designed for durability and outdoor use. The lantern features a rounded metal top with vent holes for heat dissipation and a matching base that houses the fuel reservoir. Two vertical metal rods connect the top and bottom, providing structural support and forming a protective cage around the glass. The glass enclosure is clear and ribbed, allowing light to diffuse evenly while shielding the flame or bulb inside. There are several knobs and valves on the base, likely for adjusting the fuel flow and lighting mechanism. The lantern has a weathered, dark metallic finish, giving it an antique and utilitarian appearance suitable for urban streets, parks, or garages.
description: A vintage metal lantern with a cylindrical ribbed glass enclosure, protective metal cage, and adjustment knobs on a rounded base. The weathered metallic finish gives it an antique, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical glass enclosure, protective metal rods, and the rounded top and base.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side adjustment knob and the curvature of the metal supports.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two adjustment knobs and the full width of the base, with the glass enclosure clearly visible.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the metal cage structure and the angled position of the side knob.
